Okay, so here's what we covered in Module 1. First we covered the elements of a good niche or market. We talked about assessing the marketplace sophistication. We talked about developing a unique mechanism. We talked about assessing the competitive landscape, developing your six-figure funnel formula hook, and developing your six-figure funnel formula promise. Here's what to do now. Step one, start by analyzing your niche market ideas, the ideas that you have for different niches, for different markets, against the criteria that I gave you. Step two, review the current and past hooks and promises of the top 10 competitors to understand your marketplace's sophistication or your market sophistication level. So in step one, you're going to analyze your niche market ideas against the criteria that we talked about. You're going to pick your niche, and then what you're going to do is you're going to review the current and past hooks and promises of who would be your top 10 competitors to understand your market sophistication level. Then you're going to review those top 10 competitors again, but now you're going to review their current offers to better understand the competitive landscape. Then you're going to begin to brainstorm your six-figure funnel formula hook based on the elements that I gave you. And finally, you're going to brainstorm your six-figure funnel formula promise also based on the elements that I gave you.
